# ZoomLocal

> ZoomLocal is a local growth agency for local businesses in India and worldwide. Our core service is fully managed Google Business Profile management (reviews, rankings, content, profile protection and reporting). We also offer website development, Google Ads management, and AEO/GEO (AI search optimization to get businesses recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity). We additionally provide free marketing audit tools that businesses and agencies can run or embed.

## Services
- Google Business Profile Management (core): done-for-you local SEO, from Rs 100 per day per location.
- Website Development: fast, SEO-ready websites.
- Google Ads: targeted local ad campaigns.
- AEO / GEO: AI search optimization to get recommended by AI answer engines.

## Key pages
- [Services / Managed Local SEO](https://zoomlocal.in/): our core Google Business Profile management service.
- [Pricing](https://zoomlocal.in/pricing): transparent, all-inclusive managed Local SEO pricing.
- [Free Tools](https://zoomlocal.in/tools): Google Business Profile audit, website SEO audit, AI search visibility, local rank checker, review analysis, and more.
- [Blog](https://zoomlocal.in/blog): practical Local SEO and AI search guides.
